Who I Am

Crafting Experiences
That Matter

Hi, I'm Kanishkaran — a UI/UX Designer with 3+ years of hands-on experience turning complex problems into clean, intuitive digital experiences. I believe great design is invisible: it just works.

My approach is rooted in user-centered design — understanding people first, then crafting interfaces that feel natural, accessible, and visually compelling.

Based in Sri Lanka, I collaborate with clients globally to deliver designs that balance aesthetics with functionality, from wireframes to pixel-perfect prototypes.

12+Happy Clients

Freelance Rates

Transparent Pricing

Clear, upfront pricing. No hidden fees. Every project tailored to your needs.

Starter
Basic
Rs. $30 – $60
  • Simple UI design (1–2 pages)
  • Basic wireframe included
  • Clean, modern visual design
  • Mobile responsive layouts
  • 1 round of revisions
Get Started
Most Popular
Professional
Standard
Rs. $80 – $160
  • Multi-page UI/UX design
  • Interactive prototyping
  • Component design system
  • Mobile & desktop responsive
  • 3 rounds of revisions
Get Started
Enterprise
Premium
Rs. $180+
  • Full UI/UX system design
  • User research & analysis
  • Wireframes + prototypes
  • Complete design system
  • Usability testing
